footer.tagline: A premium digital marketing agency engineering growth for ambitious brands through strategy, content, and paid media.

about.hero_subtitle: Founded on the belief that great marketing is a multiplier — not a cost center. We're the team ambitious brands call when they're ready to grow.
about.mission_p1: REVOLVER was founded with a singular mission: to close the gap between a brand's potential and its actual results. Too many great businesses get lost in the noise — not because their product isn't good, but because their marketing isn't working hard enough.
about.mission_p2: We combine strategic thinking, neuromarketing principles, and premium creative execution to build marketing systems that compound over time. Not campaigns — engines.

values.title: Results First
values.desc: Every decision is driven by data and tied to measurable outcomes. Vanity metrics don't exist in our vocabulary.

values.title: Trust & Transparency
values.desc: We tell you what's working and what isn't — no spin, no fluff. Honest reporting every single month.

values.title: Creative Excellence
values.desc: Great marketing is great storytelling. We obsess over every word, pixel, and frame to deliver premium quality.

values.title: True Partnership
values.desc: We work as an extension of your team — invested in your success as if it were our own business.

team.name: Alex Reeves
team.desc: 10+ years in digital marketing. Obsessed with brand psychology and conversion-driven creative.

team.name: Sofia Marsh
team.desc: Ex-Meta advertiser managing $2M+ in ad spend monthly. Precision targeting is her superpower.

team.name: Luca Fontaine
team.desc: Former brand journalist turned content marketer. Crafts narratives that resonate and convert.

team.name: Nina Kovacs
team.desc: Award-winning videographer and editor. Creates content that stops the scroll, every time.

about.cta_subtitle: We take on a limited number of new clients each quarter. Let's see if we're the right fit.

our_work.hero_subtitle: A selection of campaigns, launches, and growth stories from the brands we've had the privilege of building.

1.challenge: FitLife had zero brand presence online. We built their social identity from scratch and engineered a content strategy that resonated with fitness enthusiasts aged 18–35.

2.challenge: EcoWear needed rapid awareness for their sustainable fashion launch. TikTok-native content strategy with influencer seeding drove 2.1M organic views.

3.challenge: TechPulse's previous agency was burning budget with generic targeting. We rebuilt their Google Ads architecture from scratch, achieving 4.9× ROAS in month 2.

4.challenge: NovaCafe had 200 followers and inconsistent content. Full Instagram strategy with daily management grew them to 48K in 6 months.

5.challenge: LuxeSkin's product launch needed maximum impact in minimum time. Brand identity, ad creative, and influencer campaign generated €180K in week 1.

6.challenge: AutoVision needed qualified leads, not just clicks. Targeted lead generation funnels across Facebook and Google now deliver 320+ qualified leads per month.

our_work.cta_subtitle: Let's build a case study around your brand's growth story.

pricing_page.hero_subtitle: No lock-in contracts. Cancel anytime. Every plan includes onboarding and dedicated support.

faq.q: Is there a minimum contract length?
faq.a: No lock-in contracts. All plans are month-to-month and can be cancelled at any time with 30 days' notice.
Every plan starts with a strategy session, brand audit, and competitor analysis. We make sure we understand your business deeply before producing a single piece of content.

faq.q: Can I upgrade or downgrade my plan?
faq.a: Absolutely. You can switch plans at any time. Changes take effect at the start of the next billing cycle.

faq.q: Do you work with international clients?
faq.a: Yes. We work with brands across Europe, the US, and the Middle East. All deliverables are available in English and Georgian.

faq.q: How quickly will I see results?
faq.a: Most clients see meaningful engagement improvements within 30 days. Significant revenue impact typically becomes measurable within 60–90 days.

faq.q: What if I need something custom?
faq.a: Contact us and we'll build a custom package. We work with brands of all sizes and budgets.

pricing_page.cta_subtitle: Tell us about your brand and goals — we'll recommend the right package for your budget and objectives.
